summary: Unified pill style system testing completed. All 7 filter buttons render correctly with proper color tokens. Active/inactive styling works as expected. Code review confirms PILL_STYLES is properly shared between HivePage.js filter bar and PostCards.js badges.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified pill style system verified. PILL_STYLES defined in PostCards.js (lines 52-66), VARIANT_PILL_STYLES (lines 68-82). Filter bar in HivePage.js (lines 700-720) uses imported PILL_STYLES. PostTypeBadge and VariantTag components use same styles for card badges.

playwright_tests.test_2_seven_filter_buttons: PASS - 7 filters: all, NOW_SPINNING, NEW_HAUL, ISO, listing, NOTE, following
playwright_tests.test_3_filter_labels: PASS - All, Now Spinning, New Haul, ISO, For Sale/Trade, A Note, Following
playwright_tests.test_4_active_filter_styling: PASS - Active filter has shadow-sm and font-semibold
playwright_tests.test_6_now_spinning_amber: PASS - NOW_SPINNING filter uses text-amber-700, border-amber-200
playwright_tests.test_7_filter_click_changes_active: PASS - Clicking NOW_SPINNING makes it active (gains shadow), All becomes inactive (gains opacity)
playwright_tests.test_8_color_token_verification: PASS - All filters use correct colors: all(stone), NOW_SPINNING(amber), NEW_HAUL(pink), ISO(orange), listing(teal), NOTE(yellow), following(violet)

code_review_verification.pill_styles_export: VERIFIED - PILL_STYLES exported from PostCards.js line 433
code_review_verification.pill_styles_import: VERIFIED - PILL_STYLES imported in HivePage.js line 38
code_review_verification.post_type_badge: VERIFIED - PostTypeBadge (lines 84-109) uses PILL_STYLES[type] for border-styled pills
code_review_verification.variant_tag: VERIFIED - VariantTag (lines 124-135) uses VARIANT_PILL_STYLES for color-mapped styling with data-testid='variant-pill'
code_review_verification.filter_bar_implementation: VERIFIED - HivePage.js lines 700-720 renders filter pills with PILL_STYLES colors
code_review_verification.active_inactive_styling: VERIFIED - Active: solid bg + shadow-sm + font-semibold | Inactive: bg-white + opacity 0.65

notes.variant_pill_testing: Could not verify VariantTag color-mapping visually as test user has no posts with color_variant data. Code review confirms implementation is correct - uses string.includes() to match variant names to VARIANT_PILL_STYLES colors
notes.card_badge_testing: Could not verify PostTypeBadge on actual cards as test user has no posts in Hive feed. Code review confirms implementation uses PILL_STYLES correctly
